title: Mqryo's Mob Statues
description: A resource pack that adds a statue of your everyday mobs! (no mods needed!)
body:
![Mob Statues Logo 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97caa8062eda7d9cb8fc9e609c2d393875d30cba.png)
Check out my [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@MqryoPacks) channel and [Twitter](https://x.com/MqryoPacks) here! :D

# 🗿MOB STATUES!🗿

Inspired by the recent Copper Golem Statue feature, this Resource Pack adds **20 NEW MOB STATUES** to add even more depth to your builds! All with **NO MODS**!


# ❓HOW TO USE❓

Simply rename a **Nautilus Shell** using an anvil to one of the following names*, and place them in an item frame!

The Resource Pack also adds an Invisible Glow Item Frame, to showcase your builds in the most immersive way possible!

*All Statues available:
- Allay Statue
- Allay Stone Statue
- Cow Statue
- Cow Stone Statue
- Chicken Statue
- Chicken Stone Statue
- Creeper Statue
- Creeper Stone Statue
- Cave Spider Statue
- Cave Spider Stone Statue
- Piglin Brute Statue
- Piglin Brute Stone Statue
- Spider Statue
- Spider Stone Statue
- Wither Skeleton Statue
- Wither Skeleton Stone Statue
- Skeleton Statue
- Skeleton Stone Statue
- Zombie Statue
- Zombie Stone Statue
